requirements.summary: Display the generated InnerLift Wellness logo image in the Navigation and Footer components, replacing any existing logo or text-only brand mark
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image appears in the top navigation bar on all pages
The logo links back to the homepage (/)
The logo is displayed at an appropriate size and does not overflow the navigation bar
The logo also appears in the Footer component's brand section

file_operations.description: Replace the existing AyurGlow logo or text brand mark with the InnerLift Wellness logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png). Update the element wrapping the brand to use an tag displaying the logo at appropriate dimensions. Ensure the logo links to the homepage (/) and includes proper alt text ('InnerLift Wellness'). Maintain existing navigation structure and mobile menu functionality.

Replace the existing AyurGlow logo or text brand mark in the footer's brand section with the InnerLift Wellness logo image (frontend/public/assets/generated/innerlift-logo.dim_300x80.png). Update the brand section to display the logo using an tag with appropriate dimensions and alt text ('InnerLift Wellness'). Maintain existing footer layout, social links, and navigation columns.

Update the favicon link to use the InnerLift Wellness favicon (frontend/public/assets/generated/innerlift-favicon.dim_64x64.png). Update the <title> tag and meta description to reflect 'InnerLift Wellness' branding instead of 'AyurGlow Secrets'. Ensure the favicon is properly linked in the document head.
